# Krill — LLM context

> Krill is a standalone React UI component library (design system). Single npm package,
> styled-components v5. This file is generated by `npm run llms` from `docs/registry/*.tsx` —
> don't hand-edit it, edit the registry instead.

## Setup

```
npm install krill react react-dom
```

React 18 or 19 — see Krill's own README for the React 17 cutoff and why.

```tsx
import { Button } from 'krill';
```

React/react-dom are peerDependencies, not bundled. The consuming app's global CSS must define the
theme's CSS custom properties (e.g. `--bg-l0-solid`, `--text-primary`, `--accent-blue-primary`) —
krill only *reads* them via `getThemedColor()`, it doesn't ship a default theme stylesheet.

## Conventions

- Every component accepts `className`/`style` where relevant, and most accept `forceTheme?:
  ThemeMode` to render in a fixed theme regardless of the page's ambient one (used by floating
  surfaces like Dropdown, which is always dark).
- Colors are CSS custom properties resolved through `getThemedColor()` / `getAccentColorValues()`
  — never hardcoded hex values. `AccentColor` = green | orange | red | yellow | pink | dark-blue |
  blue. `Color` adds primary | secondary | tertiary | disabled | destructive | link | inverse |
  white | black.
- Dates use `dayjs` (`Dayjs` type), not native `Date`, across DateField/DatePicker/TimeField/etc.
- Most hooks are internal-only; the public ones are `useHotkeys`, `useSwipe`, `useOnEscapePress`,
  `useOnClickOutside`.
- No test framework or Storybook in this repo.

## Components

### Data display

#### AnimatedArrowIcon

A chevron that animates between expanded and collapsed orientations, for disclosure triggers.

`import { AnimatedArrowIcon } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `isOpen` | `boolean` | yes |  | Whether the arrow points outward/expanded ('open') or inward/collapsed ('closed'). |

#### Avatar

A circular user avatar, showing initials or an icon, with an optional status badge.

`import { Avatar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Initials shown when no icon is given. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Icon shown instead of initials. |
| `showBadge` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a small status badge. |
| `active` | `boolean` |  |  | Colors the badge as active/online. |
| `size` | `Size` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Avatar size. |

#### Badge

A count or dot overlay anchored to the corner of an icon, avatar, or other element.

`import { Badge } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | The element the badge is anchored to. |
| `count` | `number` |  |  | Badge count; omit along with dot to render nothing. |
| `dot` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders a plain dot instead of a count. |
| `color` | `AccentColor` |  | `'red'` | Badge background color. |
| `max` | `number` |  | `99` | Counts above this render as "{max}+". |
| `showZero` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Renders the badge even when count is 0. |

#### Chip

A small, colored label tag.

`import { Chip } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Chip text. |
| `color` | `AccentColor` |  |  | Accent color. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Leading icon. |
| `size` | `ChipSize` |  |  | Chip size. |

#### CircleBadge

An icon in a small rounded badge container with a subtle shadow.

`import { CircleBadge, Icon } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `icon` | `Icon` | yes |  | Icon to render. |
| `color` | `Color \| 'source'` |  |  | Icon color. |
| `size` | `Size` |  |  | Badge size. |
| `hideContainer` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders just the icon, without the badge background/shadow. |
| `onClick` | `() => void` |  |  | Click handler. |

#### CodeBlock

A read-only syntax-highlighted code snippet with a copy button, themed via CSS vars.

`import { CodeBlock } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `code` | `string` | yes |  | Source code to render. |
| `language` | `'tsx' \| 'bash'` |  | `'tsx'` | Prism language used for highlighting. |

#### CopyToClipboardButton

An icon button that swaps to a checkmark briefly after being clicked, for copy confirmations.

`import { CopyToClipboardButton } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onClick` | `(evt?: React.MouseEvent) => void` | yes |  | Performs the copy. |

#### EncryptionBadge

A small badge communicating the encryption status of a message: end-to-end, PGP, or external.

`import { EncryptionBadge, EncryptionBadgeType } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `type` | `EncryptionBadgeType` |  | `EncryptionBadgeType.E2EE` | Which icon to show: the E2EE shield, the PGP key, or the external lock. |
| `tooltipSubtext` | `string` |  |  | Tooltip subtext rendered below the title. |
| `hideTooltip` | `boolean` |  |  | Suppresses the tooltip entirely. |
| `isTrusted` | `boolean` |  |  | Tints the icon green to indicate a trusted/verified key. |
| `onClick` | `() => void` |  |  | Click handler. |

#### EventDot

A small colored dot, used by DatePicker to mark days that have events.

`import { EventDot } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `color` | `string` | yes |  | CSS color value, e.g. 'var(--accent-orange-primary)'. |
| `type` | `EventDotType` |  | `EventDotType.FILLED` | Filled or outlined. |
| `isFaded` | `boolean` |  |  | Fades the dot, e.g. for days outside the displayed month. |
| `isSelected` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether the dot sits on a selected/highlighted background. |

#### Facepile

Renders a collection of Avatars, inline or stacked, collapsing overflow into a "+N" label.

`import { Facepile, Avatar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `AvatarComponent[]` | yes |  | Avatar elements. |
| `layout` | `Layout` |  | `Layout.INLINE` | Inline (overlapping row) or stacked. |
| `maxDisplayed` | `number` |  | `4` | Max visible Avatars in an inline layout. |
| `size` | `FacepileSize` |  | `Size.LARGE` | Avatar size. |
| `background` | `string` |  |  | Override background color behind each Avatar. |
| `onMoreClick` | `() => void` |  |  | Called when the "+N" overflow label is clicked. |

#### Icons

Renders one of the library's bundled SVG icons (the `Icon` enum) inline.

`import { Icons, Icon } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `icon` | `Icon` | yes |  | Which icon to render. |
| `color` | `Color \| 'source'` |  | `'primary'` | Icon color. |
| `size` | `Size \| number` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Icon size. |
| `tooltip` | `string` |  |  | Tooltip label shown on hover. |
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void \| Promise<void>` |  |  | Click handler. |
| `rotate` | `number` |  |  | Rotation, in degrees. |

#### IconText

A label with an optional leading and/or trailing icon, sharing hover/disabled states.

`import { IconText, Icon } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string \| React.ReactNode` |  |  | Text content. |
| `startIcon` | `Icon \| IconComponent` |  |  | Icon before the text. |
| `endIcon` | `Icon \| IconComponent` |  |  | Icon after the text. |
| `color` | `Color \| 'source'` |  |  | Content color. |
| `size` | `IconTextSize` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Overall size. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disabled state. |
| `onClick` | `(e?: React.MouseEvent) => Promise<void> \| void` |  |  | Click handler. |

#### IconTextWithEndActions

An IconText row with hover-revealed end-action icon buttons, e.g. edit/delete on a settings row.

`import { IconTextWithEndActions, Icon } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `endActions` | `IconTextEndAction[]` | yes |  | Hover-revealed icon buttons, each with icon, onClick, optional tooltip. |
| `showEndActions` | `boolean` |  |  | Forces the end actions to stay visible (instead of hover-only). |
| `startComponent` | `JSX.Element` |  |  | Custom element rendered before the label, instead of startIcon. |

#### KeyCodeSequence

Renders a keyboard shortcut as styled key caps, e.g. for shortcut hints in menus.

`import { KeyCodeSequence } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `shortcut` | `string` | yes |  | Keys joined by '+' render together (pressed at once); joined by ' ' render with "THEN" (pressed in sequence). |
| `size` | `KeyCodeSequenceSize` |  |  | Key cap size. |

#### ListItem

A row with a leading visual, title, optional subtitle/trailing content, and hover-revealed actions.

`import { ListItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string \| React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Primary text. |
| `active` | `boolean` |  |  | Controls the row's selected/highlighted state. |
| `leading` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Leading visual, e.g. an Avatar. |
| `subtitle` | `string \| React.ReactNode` |  |  | Secondary text below the title. |
| `trailing` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Trailing content, e.g. a timestamp. |
| `actions` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Hover-revealed trailing actions. |
| `unread` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows the unread dot and bolds the title. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables hover/click interactions. |

#### MonoTag

A small monospace tag, e.g. for version numbers or status labels.

`import { MonoTag } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Tag text. |
| `color` | `Color` |  |  | Single-tone color for text and background. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Leading icon. |

#### Stepper

A vertical list of numbered steps, each with bold and regular text segments.

`import { Stepper } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `StepperItem[]` | yes |  | Steps, each with a bold and text segment. |

#### Table

A data table with custom column renderers and optional row selection.

`import { Table } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `columns` | `TableColumn<T>[]` | yes |  | Column definitions with custom cell renderers. |
| `rows` | `T[]` | yes |  | Row data. |
| `getRowKey` | `(row: T) => string` | yes |  | Returns a unique key per row. |
| `selectable` | `boolean` |  |  | Enables row selection checkboxes. |
| `selectedKeys` | `string[]` |  |  | Controlled selected row keys. |
| `onSelectedKeysChange` | `(keys: string[]) => void` |  |  | Called when selection changes. |

#### Typography

The base text component every other component renders its labels through.

`import { Typography, TypographySize, TypographyWeight } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Text content. |
| `color` | `Color` |  | `'primary'` | Text color. |
| `size` | `TypographySize` |  | `TypographySize.MEDIUM` | Text size. |
| `weight` | `TypographyWeight` |  | `TypographyWeight.REGULAR` | Font weight. |
| `align` | `Alignment` |  |  | Text alignment. |
| `mono` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders in the monospace typeface. |
| `uppercase` | `boolean` |  |  | Uppercases the text. |
| `capitalize` | `boolean` |  |  | Capitalizes the text. |
| `wrap` | `boolean` |  |  | Whether text lines may wrap at soft-wrap opportunities. |
| `selectable` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Whether the text is user-selectable. |
| `inline` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders as an inline element instead of a block. |
| `textDecoration` | `TextDecoration` |  |  | Underline or strike-through text. |
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void` |  |  | Click handler. |

#### VirtualizedList

Windowed list rendering for lists too large to render in full, e.g. a 10k+ row inbox. Built on react-window.

`import { VirtualizedList } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `T[]` | yes |  | The full (unwindowed) list of items. |
| `itemHeight` | `number` | yes |  | Fixed height of each row, in pixels. |
| `height` | `number` | yes |  | Visible height of the list, in pixels. |
| `renderItem` | `(item: T, index: number) => React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Renders a single row. |
| `getItemKey` | `(item: T, index: number) => string` |  |  | Returns a unique key per item. |
| `overscanCount` | `number` |  | `4` | Rows rendered outside the visible window. |
| `emptyState` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Content shown when items is empty. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  | `'100%'` | List width. |

### Date & time

#### DateDisplay

Renders a date as relative ("3 hours ago") or absolute text, and keeps relative timestamps live.

`import { DateDisplay } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string \| number \| Date \| Dayjs` | yes |  | The date to display. |
| `type` | `'relative' \| 'absolute'` |  | `'relative'` | Display mode. |
| `dateFormat` | `string` |  | `'MMM D, YYYY'` | dayjs format string for the date portion in absolute mode. |
| `hourFormat` | `'12' \| '24'` |  | `'12'` | Clock format for the time portion in absolute mode. |

#### DateField

A text field that opens a calendar dropdown (desktop) or drawer (mobile) for picking a date.

`import { DateField } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onSelectDate` | `(date: Date \| null) => void` | yes |  | Called when a date is picked. |
| `date` | `Dayjs` |  |  | Controlled value. |
| `dateFormat` | `string` |  | `'MM/DD/YYYY'` | dayjs format string for the input display. |
| `showIcon` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a calendar icon at the start of the field. |
| `minDate` | `Date` |  |  | The earliest selectable date. |
| `isReadOnly` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables editing. |

#### DatePicker

A standalone calendar grid, the same one DateField opens in a dropdown. Supports an optional colored event-dot overlay per day.

`import { DatePicker } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onSelectDate` | `(date: Date \| null) => void` | yes |  | Called when a day is clicked. |
| `selectedDate` | `Dayjs` |  |  | Controlled value. |
| `minDate` | `Date` |  |  | The earliest selectable date. |
| `events` | `{ date: Dayjs; colors: string[] }[]` |  |  | Renders colored dots under days that have events. |
| `showHeader` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Shows the month/year header with prev/next arrows. |

#### DateRangePicker

A calendar grid for picking a start/end date range. Click a day to set the start, click again to set the end.

`import { DateRangePicker } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onSelectRange` | `(range: DateRange) => void` | yes |  | Called when the start or end of the range is picked. |
| `selectedRange` | `DateRange` |  |  | Controlled value: `{ start: Dayjs \| null; end: Dayjs \| null }`. |
| `minDate` | `Date` |  |  | The earliest selectable date. |
| `showHeader` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Shows the month/year header with prev/next arrows. |

#### HourPicker

A scrollable hour/minute (and AM/PM) wheel picker, used by TimeField on mobile.

`import { HourPicker } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `itemHeight` | `number` | yes |  | Height of each scrollable item, in pixels. |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called as the wheels settle on a new value. |
| `timeFormat` | `'h' \| 'H' \| 'h A' \| 'h:mm A' \| 'H:mm' \| 'HH:mm'` | yes |  | Determines whether an AM/PM wheel is shown. |
| `initialHour` | `Dayjs \| null` |  |  | Initial wheel position. |
| `minuteInterval` | `number` |  | `1` | Minute increment shown in the minute wheel. |

#### TimeField

A text field that opens a time-list dropdown (desktop) or a scrollable hour-wheel drawer (mobile, via HourPicker).

`import { TimeField } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onSelectTime` | `(time: Dayjs \| string) => void` | yes |  | Called when a time is picked or typed. |
| `date` | `Dayjs` |  |  | Controlled value. |
| `hourFormat` | `'12' \| '24'` |  | `'12'` | Clock format. |
| `minuteInterval` | `number` |  | `15` | Minute increment shown in the time list / hour wheel. |
| `showIcon` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a clock icon at the start of the field. |

#### TimeZonePicker

A searchable dropdown of IANA time zones, each shown with its current UTC offset and a representative city.

`import { TimeZonePicker } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `buttonRef` | `MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement \| null>` | yes |  | Anchor element ref. |
| `isOpen` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `timeZone` | `string` | yes |  | Currently selected IANA time zone name. |
| `setIsOpen` | `Dispatch<SetStateAction<boolean>>` | yes |  | Updates the open state. |
| `onSelectTimeZone` | `(tzName: string) => void` | yes |  | Called when a time zone is selected. |
| `fixedHeight` | `boolean` |  |  | Locks the dropdown's scroll area to a fixed height. |

### Feedback

#### Banner

A full-width, dismissible message bar with optional CTAs. ThemedBanner wraps it to always render in the opposite of the current theme.

`import { Banner } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Banner text. |
| `color` | `AccentColor` |  |  | Accent color. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Leading icon. |
| `ctas` | `{ label: string; onClick: () => void }[]` |  |  | Action buttons. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` |  |  | Shows a close button and calls this when clicked. |

#### CircularProgress

A circular progress indicator, usable as a determinate ring or an indeterminate spinner.

`import { CircularProgress } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `spinner` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders an indeterminate spinning ring. |
| `progress` | `number` |  |  | Percentage complete, 0–100, for determinate mode. |
| `size` | `CircularProgressSize` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Ring size. |

#### EmptyIllustration

A title/subtitle/action composition for empty states, with a default skeleton-list illustration.

`import { EmptyIllustration } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string` | yes |  | Title text. |
| `subtitle` | `string` | yes |  | Subtitle text below the title. |
| `action` | `{ label: string; onClick: () => void }` |  |  | Renders a button below the subtitle. |
| `illustration` | `React.ReactNode` |  | `a generic skeleton list illustration` | Custom visual rendered above the title/subtitle. |

#### ProgressBar

A determinate horizontal progress indicator.

`import { ProgressBar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `progress` | `number` | yes |  | Percentage complete, 0–100. |

#### Skeleton

A loading placeholder block.

`import { Skeleton } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Skeleton width. |
| `height` | `number \| string` |  |  | Skeleton height. |

#### Toast

A transient notification, typically summoned via the useToast hook rather than rendered directly.

`import { Toast } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `title` | `string \| JSX.Element` |  |  | Bolded header above the body text. |
| `body` | `string` |  |  | Main toast text. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Optional leading icon. |
| `actions` | `{ label: string; onClick: () => void }[]` |  |  | CTAs rendered in the toast. |
| `duration` | `number` |  | `TOAST_DEFAULT_DURATION` | Ms before auto-dismissing. |
| `persist` | `boolean` |  |  | Keeps the toast on screen until manually closed. |

### Inputs

#### Button

A clickable action with primary, secondary, and destructive variants.

`import { Button } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Button label content. |
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void \| Promise<void>` | yes |  | Click handler. |
| `type` | `Type` |  | `Type.PRIMARY` | Visual variant. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Optional leading icon. |
| `size` | `Size` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Button size. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the button. |
| `loading` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a spinner in place of the label. |
| `fullWidth` | `boolean` |  |  | Stretches the button to its container width. |

#### Checkbox

A checkbox with checked, indeterminate, error, and disabled states.

`import { Checkbox } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void` | yes |  | Click handler. |
| `checked` | `boolean` |  |  | Checked state. |
| `indeterminate` | `boolean` |  |  | Indeterminate state; takes priority over checked. |
| `error` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a destructive color when unchecked. |
| `checkedColor` | `IconColor` |  | `'orange'` | Overrides the checked icon color. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the checkbox. |
| `padding` | `boolean` |  |  | Widens the clickable area without changing the icon's size. |

#### ChipInput

A text input that turns entries into removable chips, e.g. for email recipients or tags.

`import { ChipInput } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `string[]` | yes |  | Current chip values. |
| `onItemsChange` | `(items: string[]) => void` | yes |  | Called when items are added or removed. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text. |
| `validate` | `(value: string) => boolean` |  |  | Validates an entry before it becomes a chip. |

#### CodeInput

A row of single-character boxes for entering a verification code.

`import { CodeInput } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string` | yes |  | Controlled value. |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called as digits are entered. |
| `codeLength` | `number` | yes |  | Number of character boxes. |
| `onSubmit` | `() => void` |  |  | Called once all boxes are filled. |
| `type` | `CodeInputType` |  |  | Numeric or alphanumeric keyboard. |

#### ColorSelector

A row of accent-color swatches, with an optional custom-color picker swatch.

`import { ColorSelector, accentColorToPrimaryColor } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `colorToStyling` | `Record<AccentColor, string>` | yes |  | Maps each accent color to its CSS value. |
| `value` | `string` | yes |  | Currently selected color. |
| `handleChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called when a swatch is clicked. |
| `handlePickerChange` | `(value: string) => void` |  |  | If set, adds a custom-color swatch that opens a hex picker. |
| `hideSelected` | `boolean` |  |  | Hides the selected-state border. |

#### FilterSelect

A searchable dropdown of filter labels with multi-select checkmarks and a clear-all action.

`import { FilterSelect } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `buttonRef` | `RefObject<HTMLDivElement>` | yes |  | Anchor element ref. |
| `filterLabels` | `string[]` | yes |  | All available filter labels. |
| `isFilterActive` | `(filter: string) => boolean` | yes |  | Whether a given filter is currently active. |
| `onSelectFilter` | `(filter: string) => void` | yes |  | Toggles a filter. |
| `clearAllFilters` | `() => void` | yes |  | Clears every active filter. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | yes |  | Closes the dropdown. |
| `numActiveFilters` | `number` |  |  | Shown in the footer with a clear-all link. |

#### IconButton

A square, icon-only button, useful for toolbars and compact actions.

`import { IconButton } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `icon` | `Icon \| IconComponent` | yes |  | The icon to render. |
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void \| Promise<void>` | yes |  | Click handler. |
| `type` | `Type` |  | `Type.PRIMARY` | Color variant. |
| `variant` | `FilledVariant` |  | `FilledVariant.FILLED` | Filled or unfilled background. |
| `tooltip` | `string \| JSX.Element` |  |  | Tooltip shown on hover. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the button. |

#### InputField

A single-line text input with optional icon, error state, and helper text.

`import { InputField } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Controlled value. |
| `onChange` | `(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void` |  |  | Change handler. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Leading icon. |
| `error` | `boolean \| string` |  |  | Error state or message. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables editing. |
| `size` | `InputFieldSize` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Field size. |

#### InputFieldEndAction

A small icon button meant to sit inside an InputField via its endAdornment prop, e.g. a clear or show-password action.

`import { InputFieldEndAction } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `icon` | `Icon` | yes |  | The icon to render. |
| `onClick` | `() => void` | yes |  | Click handler. |
| `tooltip` | `string` |  |  | Tooltip label. |
| `size` | `Size` |  |  | Icon size. |

#### MobileSearch

A search input styled for mobile, with a cancel button and a resettable query.

`import { MobileSearch } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `setSearchQuery` | `(query: string) => void` | yes |  | Called as the user types. |
| `initialValue` | `string` |  |  | Initial query value. |
| `placeHolder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text. |
| `onCancel` | `() => void` |  |  | Called when the cancel button is pressed. |
| `disableCancelButton` | `boolean` |  |  | Hides the cancel button. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disabled state. |
| `resetKey` | `string \| number` |  |  | Changing this value clears the search, e.g. when the consumer navigates to a different view. |
| `showBorder` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a border around the input. |

#### MobileSelect

The drawer-based select variant SelectField renders on mobile devices; usable directly to force the mobile UI on any device.

`import { MobileSelect, DropdownItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `DropdownItemComponent[]` | yes |  | DropdownItem options. |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called when an option is selected. |
| `menuControls` | `{ isOpen: boolean; setIsOpen: (open: boolean) => void }` |  |  | Externally controls the drawer instead of internal state. |

#### NumberInput

A quantity input with increment/decrement buttons, clamped to a min/max range.

`import { NumberInput } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `number` | yes |  | Current value. |
| `onChange` | `(value: number) => void` | yes |  | Called with the clamped next value. |
| `min` | `number` |  | `-Infinity` | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` |  | `Infinity` | Maximum value. |
| `step` | `number` |  | `1` | Increment per click. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables both buttons. |

#### PasswordField

A password input with a show/hide toggle and an optional strength meter.

`import { PasswordField } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string` | yes |  | Controlled value. |
| `onChange` | `(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => void` | yes |  | Change handler. |
| `showStrength` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a strength meter below the field, based on a simple length/variety heuristic (not a real entropy estimate). |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  | `'Password'` | Placeholder text. |
| `error` | `boolean \| string` |  |  | Error state or message. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables editing. |

#### RadioButton

A selectable row with a label, optional description, and a radio indicator.

`import { RadioButton } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | `boolean` | yes |  | Checked state. |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Primary text. |
| `onClick` | `() => void` |  |  | Click handler. |
| `description` | `string` |  |  | Secondary text rendered below the label. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables hover/click interactions. |

#### RadioCheckbox

The bare radio indicator icon used inside RadioButton; usable standalone for custom radio rows.

`import { RadioCheckbox } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | `boolean` |  |  | Checked state. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the radio. |
| `size` | `Size` |  | `Size.X_MEDIUM` | Icon size. |
| `onClick` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void` |  |  | Click handler. |

#### RichTextEditor

A controlled rich-text compose editor with a formatting toolbar (bold, italic, underline, strikethrough, lists, links). Built on TipTap.

`import { RichTextEditor } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string` | yes |  | Controlled HTML content. |
| `onChange` | `(html: string) => void` | yes |  | Called with the updated HTML on every edit. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  | `'Write something...'` | Placeholder text shown when empty. |
| `editable` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Disables editing while still rendering content. |
| `showToolbar` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Shows the formatting toolbar. |
| `autoFocus` | `boolean` |  |  | Focuses the editor on mount. |
| `minHeight` | `number \| string` |  | `120` | Minimum height of the editable area. |

#### Select

A dropdown select built from DropdownItem children.

`import { Select, DropdownItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `DropdownItemComponent[]` | yes |  | DropdownItem options. |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called when an option is selected. |
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Currently selected value. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text when nothing is selected. |
| `variant` | `FilledVariant` |  | `FilledVariant.UNFILLED` | Filled or ghost field. |
| `searchProps` | `{ enableSearch: boolean }` |  |  | Enables a search input inside the dropdown. |

#### SelectBox

A large selectable card with a background illustration and a radio indicator, e.g. for theme or plan pickers.

`import { SelectBox, Illustration, Illustrations } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | `boolean` | yes |  | Checked state. |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Card label. |
| `illustration` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Background visual, e.g. an Illustration element. |
| `onClick` | `() => void` | yes |  | Click handler. |
| `description` | `string` |  |  | Secondary text below the label. |
| `size` | `'small' \| 'large'` |  |  | Card size. |

#### SelectField

A responsive Select: renders the desktop Select on desktop and a drawer-based picker (MobileSelect) on mobile devices.

`import { SelectField, DropdownItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `DropdownItemComponent[]` | yes |  | DropdownItem options. |
| `onChange` | `(value: string) => void` | yes |  | Called when an option is selected. |
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Currently selected value. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text. |

#### Slider

A themed range input for picking a numeric value along a track.

`import { Slider } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `number` | yes |  | Current value. |
| `onChange` | `(value: number) => void` | yes |  | Called as the user drags. |
| `min` | `number` |  | `0` | Minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` |  | `100` | Maximum value. |
| `step` | `number` |  | `1` | Increment per step. |
| `color` | `AccentColor` |  | `'blue'` | Accent color for the filled track and thumb. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disabled state. |

#### TextArea

A multi-line text input.

`import { TextArea } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `value` | `string` |  |  | Controlled value. |
| `onChange` | `(e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) => void` |  |  | Change handler. |
| `rows` | `number` |  |  | Visible row count. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Placeholder text. |
| `disabled` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables editing. |

#### Toggle

An on/off switch.

`import { Toggle } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `checked` | `boolean` | yes |  | On/off state. |
| `onChange` | `() => void` | yes |  | Called when the toggle is clicked. |

### Layout

#### ActionBar

A bottom-anchored bar for bulk actions, with an optional progress indicator pinned to its top edge.

`import { ActionBar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Action buttons. |
| `progress` | `number` |  |  | Percentage (0-100) for a progress bar pinned to the top edge. |
| `zIndex` | `number` |  |  | Custom z-index. |

#### Breadcrumbs

A horizontal trail of links showing the current location in a hierarchy.

`import { Breadcrumbs } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `BreadcrumbItem[]` | yes |  | Items with key, label, and onClick. Omit onClick for the current (non-clickable) page. |
| `separator` | `Icon` |  | `Icon.ChevronRight` | Icon rendered between items. |

#### BrowserDesktopView

Renders children only on desktop browsers, hiding them on mobile and tablet viewports.

`import { BrowserDesktopView } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Content shown only on desktop browsers. |

#### ButtonGroup / ButtonGroupItem

A row (or stack) of buttons sharing consistent size and spacing, used for dialog/form actions.

`import { ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `ButtonGroupItemComponent[]` | yes |  | ButtonGroupItem elements. |
| `layout` | `Layout` |  | `Layout.INLINE` | Inline (row) or stacked. |
| `size` | `Size.SMALL \| Size.MEDIUM \| Size.LARGE` |  |  | Button size. |
| `fullWidth` | `boolean` |  |  | Buttons take the full width of the container. |
| `iconOnly` | `boolean` |  |  | Only display the icon for secondary buttons. |

#### Divider

A horizontal or vertical rule.

`import { Divider } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `type` | `DividerType` |  | `DividerType.HORIZONTAL` | Horizontal or vertical. |
| `color` | `'primary' \| 'secondary' \| 'tertiary' \| string` |  | `'secondary'` | Divider color. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom width. |
| `height` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom height. |

#### DottedGrid

A decorative dotted-grid background that brightens near the cursor, used behind empty/onboarding states.

`import { DottedGrid } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Defaults to the parent's width. |
| `height` | `number \| string` |  |  | Defaults to the parent's height. |
| `hideMotionLine` | `boolean` |  |  | Hides the moving cursor-tracking highlight. |
| `noAnimation` | `boolean` |  |  | Disables the highlight animation entirely. |

#### Pagination

Page navigation with prev/next arrows and an ellipsis-collapsed page range.

`import { Pagination } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `currentPage` | `number` | yes |  | Current page, 1-indexed. |
| `totalPages` | `number` | yes |  | Total number of pages. |
| `onPageChange` | `(page: number) => void` | yes |  | Called when a page is selected. |
| `siblingCount` | `number` |  | `1` | Sibling pages shown on each side of the current page. |

#### SelectedItemToolbar

A floating toolbar showing a selection count and quick actions, e.g. for bulk list selection.

`import { SelectedItemToolbar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `actions` | `ActionIcon[]` | yes |  | Icon buttons, each with key, icon, onClick. |
| `topText` | `string` | yes |  | Primary text, e.g. a selection count. |
| `subText` | `string` |  |  | Secondary text below topText. |

#### Sidebar

A navigation sidebar with optional collapsible sections, a header slot, and a footer slot.

`import { Sidebar } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `sections` | `SidebarSection[]` | yes |  | Nav sections rendered below children. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Free-form header content, e.g. a logo row. |
| `footer` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Rendered below the sections, pinned to the bottom. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  | `240px` | Sidebar width. |

#### Steps

A numbered step-progress indicator for multi-step flows like signup or checkout.

`import { Steps } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `steps` | `StepItem[]` | yes |  | Steps, each with a key and label. |
| `currentStep` | `number` | yes |  | Index (0-based) of the current step; earlier steps render as completed. |
| `color` | `AccentColor` |  | `'green'` | Accent color for completed/active steps. |

#### Surface

A themed elevation container; the underlying building block for Dialog, Dropdown, and other floating panels.

`import { Surface } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `level` | `'l0' \| 'l1' \| 'l2' \| 'l3'` |  |  | Elevation level, mapped to a background token. |
| `size` | `Size \| 'full-width' \| 'full-screen'` |  |  | Width preset. |
| `modal` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders as a centered modal with a scrim. |
| `open` | `boolean` |  |  | Opened / closed state when used as a modal. |

#### Tabs

A pill-style tab switcher. Tabs only renders the control; the consumer manages which panel is shown.

`import { Tabs } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `tabs` | `{ active: boolean; label?: string; icon?: Icon; onClick?: () => void }[]` | yes |  | Tab definitions. |
| `fullWidth` | `boolean` |  |  | Stretches the tab bar to its container width. |
| `size` | `TabsSize` |  | `Size.MEDIUM` | Tab size. |

#### ThemedBanner

A Banner that always renders in the opposite of the app theme, for high-contrast callouts.

`import { ThemedBanner } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `currentTheme` | `ThemeMode` | yes |  | The app's current theme; the banner renders in the opposite theme. |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | Banner text. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | Leading icon. |

#### TreeView

A nested, expandable/collapsible list for hierarchical data, e.g. folders or threaded items.

`import { TreeView } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `nodes` | `TreeViewNode[]` | yes |  | Root-level nodes; each may have a nested children array. |
| `defaultExpandedKeys` | `string[]` |  |  | Node keys expanded on first render. |
| `selectedKey` | `string` |  |  | Currently selected node key. |
| `onSelectNode` | `(node: TreeViewNode) => void` |  |  | Called when a row is clicked. |

### Media

#### FileImport

A drag-and-drop / click-to-import file picker, in box, button, dropzone-overlay, or row-list variants.

`import { FileImport } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `variant` | `'BOX' \| 'BUTTON' \| 'DROPZONE' \| 'SELECT'` | yes |  | BOX: dashed drag-n-drop area. BUTTON: opens the OS file picker. DROPZONE: wraps children, overlays feedback while dragging. SELECT: one or more clickable rows. |
| `onFilesAdded` | `(newFiles: File[], isFolder?: boolean) => void` | yes |  | Called with the accepted files. |
| `acceptedFileTypes` | `FileMimeTypesOrExtensions[]` |  |  | Accepted MIME types; omit to accept any file type. |
| `maxFileSizeMegabytes` | `number` |  | `10` | Max file size, in MB. |
| `foldersUpload` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a second row for uploading a whole folder (SELECT variant only). |
| `label` | `string` |  |  | Label for the BUTTON/SELECT variants. |
| `loading` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Loading state. |
| `onFilesRejected` | `(rejectedFiles: FileRejection[]) => void` |  |  | Called with files that failed validation. |

#### Illustration

A library of bundled SVG illustrations for empty states, onboarding, and settings panels.

`import { Illustration, Illustrations } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `illustration` | `Illustrations` | yes |  | Which illustration to render. |
| `scale` | `number` |  | `1` | Uniform scale transform. |
| `includeBorderRadius` | `boolean` |  |  | Rounds the illustration's corners. |

#### QrCode / QrCodeModal

Renders a themed QR code for a URL or text, with an optional centered logo, and a Dialog-wrapped variant.

`import { QrCode, QrCodeModal } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `link` | `string` | yes |  | The URL or text the QR code encodes. |
| `logoImage` | `string` |  |  | Logo image rendered in the center of the code, e.g. a data: URL. |
| `QrCodeModal props` | `{ open, onClose, title, description, link, buttonProps?, secondaryTextProps?, logoImage? }` |  |  | Wraps QrCode in a Dialog with title/description and optional action buttons. |

#### ReactPdf (PdfDocument / PdfPage)

Renders PDF files. A re-export of react-pdf's Document/Page, pre-wired to a CDN-free pdfjs-dist worker so consumers don't have to configure one themselves.

`import { PdfDocument, PdfPage } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `PdfDocument file` | `string \| File \| Blob \| Uint8Array` | yes |  | The PDF source. |
| `PdfDocument onLoadSuccess` | `(pdf: PDFDocumentProxy) => void` |  |  | Called once the document loads. |
| `PdfPage pageNumber` | `number` |  | `1` | Which page to render, 1-indexed. |
| `PdfPage width` | `number` |  |  | Render width, in pixels. |
| `PdfPage scale` | `number` |  |  | Render scale factor. |

### Overlays

#### Accordion

A list of expandable/collapsible items, single-open by default.

`import { Accordion } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `items` | `AccordionItem[]` | yes |  | Items, each with key, title, content, icon?, disabled?. |
| `allowMultiple` | `boolean` |  | `false` | Allows more than one item open at a time. |
| `defaultOpenKeys` | `string[]` |  |  | Item keys expanded on first render. |

#### CommandMenu

A search-driven command palette (⌘K style), with filtering left to the consumer.

`import { CommandMenu } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `query` | `string` | yes |  | Search query, controlled by the consumer. |
| `items` | `CommandMenuItem[]` | yes |  | Items to render, already filtered by the consumer. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | yes |  | Closes the menu. |
| `onQueryChange` | `(query: string) => void` | yes |  | Called as the user types. |
| `emptyState` | `React.ReactNode` |  |  | Content shown when items is empty. |
| `placeholder` | `string` |  |  | Search input placeholder. |
| `height` | `number` |  |  | Custom height; falls back to the Dialog default. |

#### ConfirmModal

A Dialog preconfigured for confirm/cancel flows, with an optional destructive confirm button.

`import { ConfirmModal } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `title` | `string` | yes |  | Title text. |
| `confirmName` | `string` | yes |  | Confirm button label. |
| `onClose` | `(event?, reason?) => void` | yes |  | Closes the modal; default Cancel handler. |
| `onConfirm` | `(e: React.MouseEvent) => void \| Promise<void>` | yes |  | Confirm button handler. |
| `description` | `string` |  |  | Description text. |
| `destructive` | `boolean` |  |  | Uses the destructive button style for confirm. |
| `loading` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a loading state on confirm. |

#### ContextMenu

A right-click menu positioned at the cursor, built on Dropdown's customAnchor.

`import { ContextMenu, DropdownItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `trigger` | `React.ReactElement` | yes |  | The right-clickable trigger area. |
| `children` | `DropdownItemComponent[] \| React.ReactElement` | yes |  | Menu items shown at the cursor. |

#### Dialog

A centered modal with a title, description, and action buttons.

`import { Dialog, DialogType, ButtonGroupItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `onClose` | `() => Promise<void> \| void` | yes |  | Closes the dialog. |
| `children` | `ButtonGroupItemComponent[] \| React.ReactNode` |  |  | Action buttons, or custom content when customContent is set. |
| `title` | `string` |  |  | Title text. |
| `description` | `string` |  |  | Description text below the title. |
| `type` | `DialogType` |  | `DialogType.DEFAULT` | Visual variant: default, confirm, input, promotional, search, settings, landscape. |
| `customContent` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders children directly instead of wrapping in a ButtonGroup. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom width. |

#### Drawer

A panel that slides in from an edge of the screen, optionally with swipe-to-dismiss.

`import { Drawer } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | yes |  | Closes the drawer. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Drawer content. |
| `anchor` | `'bottom' \| 'left' \| 'right' \| 'top'` |  | `'bottom'` | Edge the drawer slides in from. |
| `title` | `string` |  |  | Title text. |
| `titleIcon` | `Icon` |  |  | Icon rendered before the title. |
| `showCloseButton` | `boolean` |  |  | Shows a close button in the header; requires title. |
| `swipeable` | `boolean` |  |  | Enables swipe-to-dismiss on touch devices. |
| `maxHeight` | `number \| string` |  |  | Caps the content area's height. |

#### Dropdown / DropdownItem

A positioned menu of selectable items, anchored to a trigger element.

`import { Dropdown, DropdownItem } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode \| DropdownItemComponent[]` | yes |  | Dropdown content, typically DropdownItems. |
| `setShowDropdown` | `(open: boolean) => void` | yes |  | Updates the open state. |
| `showDropdown` | `boolean` |  |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `buttonRef` | `React.MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement \| null>` |  |  | Anchor element ref. |
| `portal` | `boolean` |  |  | Renders the dropdown in a portal. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom width. |

#### DropdownSubmenu

A DropdownItem that opens a nested Dropdown on hover, for multi-level menus.

`import { Dropdown, DropdownItem, DropdownSubmenu } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `DropdownItemComponent[] \| React.ReactElement` | yes |  | Items rendered in the nested submenu. |
| `label` | `string` | yes |  | The triggering DropdownItem label. |
| `icon` | `Icon` |  |  | The triggering DropdownItem icon. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom width for the nested submenu. |

#### Popover

A click-triggered floating panel for arbitrary rich content, built on Dropdown’s positioning.

`import { Popover } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `buttonRef` | `MutableRefObject<HTMLDivElement \| null>` | yes |  | Anchor element ref. |
| `open` | `boolean` | yes |  | Opened / closed state. |
| `onClose` | `() => void` | yes |  | Closes the popover. |
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Arbitrary content. |
| `width` | `number \| string` |  |  | Custom width. |
| `gapFromAnchor` | `number` |  |  | Gap, in px, between the anchor and the popover. |
| `portal` | `boolean` |  | `true` | Renders the popover in a portal. |

#### Portal

Renders children into a div appended to document.body, escaping any clipping/stacking-context ancestors. The low-level primitive Dropdown, Surface, and Popover build on.

`import { Portal } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `React.ReactNode` | yes |  | Content rendered into the portal. |

#### Tooltip

A hover/focus tooltip wrapping a trigger element.

`import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger } from 'krill';`

| Prop | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `children` | `[TooltipContent, TooltipTrigger]` | yes |  | Must contain one TooltipContent and one TooltipTrigger. |
| `placement` | `TooltipPlacement` |  |  | Where the tooltip renders relative to the trigger. |
